title: SWD Club cricket resumes
description: CRICKET NEWS - The Six Gun Grill SWD...
bodyText:
CRICKET NEWS - The Six Gun Grill SWD competition will resume this weekend after the holiday break.

The fixtures for the weekend (home teams indicated first) are:

Saturday

Premier League

Union Stars I vs Plett Pioneers, George vs Sussex, Harlequins Forces vs Knysna Cavaliers, Pacaltsdorp United vs Union Stars II

Promotion League

Ladismith vs Heidelberg United, Mossel Bay vs Thembalethu, New Dawn Park vs Bongolethu

Reserve League Division 1:

Union Stars B vs Dysselsdorp, Masakhane vs Harlequins Forces C, Kranshoek Cobras vs George B, Mayflower vs Albertinia, Headliners vs Hartenbos

Women's Division 1:

Union Stars vs Sussex, Harlequins Forces vs George

Women's Division 2:

Kranshoek Cobras vs Thembalethu, Plett Pioneers vs Dysselsdorp

Sunday

Reserve League Division 2:

Plett Pioneers C vs Knysna Cavaliers C, Kranshoek Cobras B vs Plett Pioneers B, Harlequins Forces B vs Beaufort West, Sussex C vs Hartenbos B, Sussex B vs Mossel Bay B, Ramblers B vs Pacaltsdorp United C, Calitzdorp Young Stars B vs Calitzdorp Young Stars A

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
